zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Margery Blount於大約1380年出生在英國德比夏爾時，她的父親Sir John Blount II, of Sodington35歲，母親Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall34歲。她於大約1398年與William Corbin結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1470年在英國斯塔福爾享年91歲。

zh-hans.Sodington, Worcestershire, England: 英国英格兰武斯特斯爾索丁頓
zh-hans.Mamble, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾馬布爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Margery Blount于大约1380年出生在英国德比夏爾时，她的父亲Sir John Blount II, of Sodington35岁，母亲Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall34岁。她于大约1398年与William Corbin结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1470年在英国斯塔福爾享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Margery Blount was born about 1380, in Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir John Blount II, of Sodington, was 35 and her mother, Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall, was 34. She married William Corbin about 1398. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1470, in Staffordshire, England, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Margery Blount est née environ 1380, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Blount II, of Sodington, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé William Corbin environ 1398. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1470, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Margery Blount um 1380 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Blount II, of Sodington 35 und ihre Mutter Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall 34. Sie hat um 1398 William Corbin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1470 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Margery Blount è nata il circa 1380 nel Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Blount II, of Sodington, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato William Corbin circa 1398. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1470, nel Staffordshire, England, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Margery Blountが約1380年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Blount II, of Sodingtonは35歳，母Isabella "Isabel" Cornwallは34歳であった。約1398年にWilliam Corbinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1470年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Margery Blount(이)가 대략 1380년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Blount II, of Sodington(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1398년 William Corbin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Margery Blount nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Blount II, of Sodington, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com William Corbin aproximadamente 1398. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1470, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Margery Blount родилась около 1380 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Blount II, of Sodington было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Corbin около 1398 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1470 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Margery Blount nació aproximadamente 1380, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Blount II, of Sodington, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall, tenía 34 años. Se casó con William Corbin aproximadamente 1398. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1470, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 91 años.
